questions.title: Find AVERAGE Power
questions.statement: A body of mass 3 kg accelerates uniformly from 2 m/s to 10 m/s in 4 seconds. Find the AVERAGE power delivered.

questions.title: Find INSTANTANEOUS Power
questions.statement: A body of mass 3 kg accelerates uniformly from 2 m/s to 10 m/s in 4 seconds. Find the INSTANTANEOUS power at the final velocity.

questions.title: Find Power (interpretation unspecified)
questions.statement: A body of mass 3 kg accelerates from 2 m/s to 10 m/s in 4 seconds. Find the power. (No interpretation specified - FORGE should report BOTH.)

questions.title: Find Displacement from rest
questions.statement: An object starts from rest and accelerates at 5 m/s^2 for 3 seconds. Find the displacement.

questions.title: Find Acceleration
questions.statement: A car speeds up from 5 m/s to 25 m/s in 4 seconds. Find its acceleration.

questions.title: Find Work using mass and velocities
questions.statement: A 5 kg object accelerates from 0 m/s to 12 m/s over 6 seconds. Find the work done on it.

questions.title: Deadlock - insufficient information
questions.statement: Given only mass 3 kg and acceleration 2 m/s^2, find the power. (Should be UNSOLVABLE.)
